div.h1: Treiber Stack Pop with Hazard Pointer Protection

div.p: Without hazard pointers: T2 could dereference freed A after T1's retire With hazard pointers: Scan sees A is protected, defers free

text.tspan: // Re-read to verify protection is valid
// Re-read to verify protection is valid
